description.content: Operations for work item attachments

Returns metadata about an attachment by its GUID identifier. The response includes the attachment URL, file name, size, and creation date. Use the URL in the response to download the actual attachment content.

REST API for managing work items, work item types, fields, queries, attachments, and comments in Azure Boards. Enables programmatic access to agile planning and tracking resources across sprints, backlogs, and boards.
